messages.content: Write a joke about a dog getting a license
Why did the dog go to get a license? He didn't want to get dog-hausted!
Why did the dog go to the DMV to get a license? He didn't want to get dog-hausted!
Neither of those are very funny. Try writing a funny joke about a dog getting a license.

Once, a dog tried to get a license, but the clerk asked for his birth certificate. The dog looked at the clerk and said, "I don't have a birth certificate. I was born in the wild." The clerk replied, "Well, that's a problem. You need a birth certificate to get a license." The dog then said, "Oh, I see. Well, I was born under a bridge, so I guess I'll just have to get a bridge license."
